prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: You’ve got this. The hardest part is the first 60 seconds—after that, momentum does the heavy lifting. You don’t need perfect; you just need a start. Take one deep breath in (4), out (6), then set a 10-minute timer and do the tiniest first step—open the file, write the title, outline three bullets. When the timer ends, you can stop… but you’ll probably want to keep going. Count down 3-2-1 and begin.
